title: Portraits Are To Daily Faces
content:
Portraits are to daily faces
    As an evening west
    To a fine, pedantic sunshine
    In a satin vest.
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Portraits Are To Daily Faces"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
